# d6()

**Type Method**

Creates a random distribution equivalent to a six-sided die.

## Declaration

```swift
class func d6() -> Self
```

## Return Value

A uniform random distribution that produces values in the range `[1, 6]`.

## Discussion

The newly created distribution uses its own [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRandomSource] instance, so the random behavior of the distribution is independent from that of other randomizers.

## Creating Specific Random Distributions

- **d20()**: Creates a random distribution equivalent to a twenty-sided die.
- **init(forDieWithSideCount:)**: Creates a random distribution equivalent to a die with the specified number of sides.
